---
title: Proteins Recovered
subtitle: SpringBloom2021 - Genome-resolved Metaproteomic Dataset
date: 09.04.2025
author: Cyrill Hofer
output:
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    highlight: tango
    self_contained: true
    code_folding: hide
    thumbnails: true
    gallery: false
    fig_width: 15
    df_print: kable
    fig_caption: yes
    use_bookdown: true
    css: custom.css
---

# Data Preparation
- Note: This data does not contain and protein identifications from contaminants
```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, paged.print=FALSE}
# Clear R's Brain
rm(list = ls())

# Set the working directory
setwd("/SynologyDrive/PhD/Projects/SpringBloom2021/Method_Paper_Analysis/FinalAnalysis/Figure_03/ProteinRecovered/")

# Load the libraries
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)
library(plotly)
library(tidyr)
library(scales)
library(forcats)
library(patchwork)

# Load the color palette
source("ColorPalette.R")

# Load the data
dat <- read_csv(file = "ProteinRecovery.csv")
```


```{r}
p <- ggplot(dat, aes(x = "", y = Protein_Recovery_Percent)) +
  # Filled circles (shape 21) with a black hairline and semi‐transparent fill
  geom_jitter(
    width  = 0.25,
    shape  = 21,
    size   = 5,
    fill   = alpha("#70a0af", 0.6),
    colour = "black",
    stroke = 0.3
  ) +
  # Box (80% opacity)
  geom_boxplot(
    width         = 0.6,
    outlier.shape = NA,
    fill          = "#70a0af",
    alpha         = 0.8,
    colour        = "black"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.5, 1.2),
    breaks = seq(0.5, 1.2, by = 0.1)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Protein Recovery [%]"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x      = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x     = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

print(p)

# And if you want to save it:
ggsave(
  filename = "Protein_Recovery_Styled.pdf",
  plot     = p,
  width    = 2,
  height   = 8,
  units    = "in",
  dpi      = 300
)
```
